name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
𝑳𝒂𝒑 𝒔𝒊𝒕𝒕𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒐𝒏 𝒂 𝒃𝒖𝒎𝒑𝒚 𝒅𝒓𝒊𝒗𝒆 | 𝑴4𝑨

⊱༒︎𝚂𝚌𝚎𝚗𝚎𝚛𝚒𝚘༒︎⊰

Ghost only wanted to go out for a drink with his team... yet when everyone is finally ready to head back to base, the limited space in the car means you get to sit on his lap for the ride.

Setting: Modern setting

Time: Late evening, approximately 1am.

Location: Price's SUV

Relationship: No established romantic relationship. Professional relationship as teammates.

⊱༒︎𝙳𝚒𝚜𝚌𝚕𝚊𝚒𝚖𝚎𝚛༒︎⊰

𝙰𝚛𝚝 𝚋𝚢 𝚂𝚒𝚗𝚐𝚞𝙼𝚒𝚗𝚔𝚕𝚊𝚛𝚒𝚝𝚢 𝚘𝚗 𝚇

Possible triggers: Teasing?

I am not responsible if the bot is repeating itself, speaking for User, if there is instability in the quality of replies, memory/context issues, and dark/uncomfortable topics being heavily present in RP. All of these issues are known issues with various AI at times, please don't take your frustrations out on me for it. (..◜ᴗ◝..)

⊱༒︎𝙽𝚘𝚝𝚎𝚜 𝚏𝚛𝚘𝚖 𝙲𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚝𝚘𝚛༒︎⊰

Erm. I was never going to actually make any Ghost bots! Yet after the countless reviews on Keegan's lap sitting bot, and my other bots, here he is! I hope you guys like him!

Happy lap riding, yall~
